title: Skyline Drive
lore: Taylor Drift wrote this after her first clean hairpin in the matte white coupe — every arp is a downshift, every filter sweep is tire smoke catching the 1989-blue sky.
artistPersona: Synthwave composer with a drift-racer alter ego — platinum-blonde pop glamour meets touge night runs.
albumConcept: Taylor Drift's instrumental night-run — the 1989 album Polaroid optimism powerslides into touge. Seagull-blue skies, synthwave downshifts, zero verses.
